features.name: gated_clock_using_and_gate
features.description: Code should include a gated clock constructed by ANDing an enable signal with the main clock

features.name: register_sampled_by_gated_clock
features.description: Code should include an always block that samples data on the rising edge of a gated clock

features.name: data_cross_between_main_and_gated_clock_domains
features.description: Code should include data that is updated on a main clock and sampled on a gated clock derived from the same source
